Title: Bianconi, Giovanni Lodovico
Subject Area: Italian (culture or style)|Italian Renaissance-Baroque styles|painting (visual works)|Renaissance
Overview: doctor, scientist, scholar, art historian; purchased Raphael's Sistine Madonna (c. 1512-14), in 1753 for the Dresden Gemäldegalerie, wrote important monographs on Piranesi (1779), Mengs ( 1780) and antiquarian work, Descrizione dei circhi particolarmente di quello di Caracalla (1789).
